feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP SF Employee Central Core Question
entry.content:
Hello Friends !

Please suggest your answer to the below question.

How do you create country specific field for the Legal Entity Object?
Please choose one correct answer:

a) As a generic object with a Valid When association to the Legal Entity object.
b) As an HRIS element in the Corporate Data Model with a Composite association to the Legal Entity object.
c) As an HRIS element in the Country Specific Field for Corporate Data Model with a Valid When Association to the Legal Entity object.

d) As a generic object with a composite association to the Legal Entity object.

#SAP Employee Central Core,
SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central 
#Employee central core
#SAP SF EC
#THR81

entry.title: Notification of leaver action, before workflow approval takes place
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to find a solution to notify our IT team when a leaver action has been triggered for any employee in employee central; we do already have a 2 step workflow approval set up (which IT are not a part of and don’t need to be) - but we want to notify them BEFORE the workflow is approved as it can sometime be delayed causing potential security risks, and we may need to remove IT access from the leaver before their leaving date. I also want to be able to use a custom notification with specific information on it to send to IT (i.e. not use the standard notification template).

  • I don’t want to add them as an additional approver as this could slow the process even further and there is no approval required by them - is just for visibility that a leaver action has been triggered.
  • I have tried adding them as a contributor to the workflow, but that will only allow the standard notification template to be used.
  • I have tried adding multiple workflows to the leaver action - but that is not possible (as per SAP notes https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3286215#:~:text=Resolution,one%20workflow%20triggering%20per%20transaction)
  • Reporting is too late - we need to know as the action is being triggered not after the fact.

Does anyone else have a similar requirement or know of anything else I can try?

Many thanks in advance!

Liz

entry.title: Scheduled Job Manager| Getting error - The user ID is invalid, unknown, or unauthorized
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have created a scheduled job request in Scheduled Job Manager using Admin User for uploading attachments in one of the background elements in Employee File.
Attachments files uploaded in SFTP as required.

The attachments are uploaded to the Active Users. All the users are present in the instance.

Getting this error - Error Msg: The user ID is invalid, unknown, or unauthorized

Kindly help - for to solve this issue. we read many KB articles , but none of these exactly show how to solve this issue.

Error Screenshot attached.

entry.title: storie report position
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community, does anyone know how I can get the following data for a storie report:

- If the position is in Vacant status, bring the time it is vacant, today from the org chart we see it as the position has vacant status since and calculate the time, example: 8 months and 5 days. how can I capture this data for storie report?

- It is possible to create a column within the report, where every time a user downloads the report it will bring the date of execution, i.e. if today June 10 I run the report, when viewing this I will find a column with the date on which it was executed.

I would appreciate your support

SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics  SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: SF EC Name Format - middle initial vs middle name
entry.content:
Hi - 

Currently, the name format that we have in place shows the First Name, Middle Name and Last Name. We would like to adjust our Name Format across SF to only show the middle initial, if applicable. We don't have a designated field in EC that stores the middle initial and was hoping we could use a business rule or some other functionality to only show the first character of the middle name vs the entire middle name. Is it possible to configure the Name Format this way or would we need a designated field in EC that contains the middle initial?

Thanks

entry.title: Necesito modificar la cuenta tiempo en SSFF, pero no esta habilitado, me aparece un candado
entry.content:
Necesito modificar la cuenta tiempo en SSFF, pero no esta habilitado, me aparece un candado.

¿Cómo puedo quitar ese candado que tiene employe central?

entry.title: Position date Vacancy in storie report
entry.content: Comunidad SAP, saben como puedo capturar el campo de cálculo cuando un puesto está en estado vacante, les comparto una imagen donde vemos que se calcula el tiempo que el puesto está vacante, quiero tener este campo para informe de storie. ¿Tienes alguna recomendación sobre cómo traerme la fecha en caso de que el puesto esté vacante?

entry.title: Is the auto-delegation supported in Performance and Succession?
entry.content:
Hi Team, 
I would like to know if SuccessFactors support the Delegation feature in the Performance and Succession modules. In other words, is the Goals, Performance, Calibration, Succession, Development capable to read the delegation from the Job Relationship portlet and grant the same permissions/access of the delegator?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Long term absence in org chart
entry.content:
Hello,

we are not using time management in SuccessFactors but we track the employees who are on long term leave in a custom field in job information in EC.

The employees of course stay in the people org chart even they are away for a long time (in some cases even years).

I didn´t find a way so far to not show them without causing other issues (like assigning a dummy manager, etc.)

Do you have any other possible solutions?

Kind regards,

Simon

entry.title: Paternity Leave-
entry.content:
Requirements:

1) Applicable to all male employees.

2) 08 months duration for another leave

3) use twice in a lifetime

Note: I'm able to achieve the 1st & 3rd requirements but not the 2nd. Any Help

entry.title: All permission removed after adding common super domain permission
entry.content:
Hi,

We have experienced an issue in role-based permissions when adding the common super domain permission. After we added the permission to the permission role and saved the changes, all the other permissions were removed.

Are there more people who might have experienced the same problem? Can this be a known bug?

Best regards, Thomas

entry.title: Success Factors Recruitment - Testing of candidates
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have a question regarding Recruitment module in Success Factors.

Requirement is that at some point candidate get tests to be completed, they can be internal or leading to external source, like web site with test questions and tasks.

I am aware of question library and questions added when creating a requisition, but that is not what works in this case.

Thanks,

entry.title: SFSF Records Retention for Personal Information (Employee Data) - Employee Central
entry.content: Hello, I am looking for feedback on the topic of deletion periods for the Employee Central module. Is it possible to store different deletion periods for different personal data in SFSF? Currently, our setup provides for one deletion period per country for all personal data (employee leaves, status: inactive, after x years the data record is deleted).

entry.title: When the field in the RCM offer letter template is set to 'yes', the portlet would be visible in EC
entry.content:
Hi Community,

If the fields 'Travel Allowance Remarks', 'Relocation Expenses', and 'Notice Buyback Remarks' in the RCM Offer Letter template are set to 'yes', the Reimbursement portlet should be visible in Employee Central for the respective employees.

Please let us know the feasibility.

Thanks.

entry.title: Workflow rejected by 2nd Level Approver shouldn't be visible to Employee(initiator)
entry.content:
Dear Community Members,

Here i do have a scenario for one of my client regarding the workflow.

In a particular WF, there are 2 levels of approver who will approve the Workflow. 

Suppose 1st level of approver approves the WF but 2nd level approver rejected the WF. Now client ask is Employee(who is the initiator of the WF) shouldn't have rights to view the rejection of 2nd level approver.

It should visible by only 1st level approver

Is it possible to achieve this, is yes please do let me know how this can be achieve

Thanks

Rashmi

entry.title: How can we hide the information from one inactive employee in SAP Successfactors? European GDPR
entry.content:
Hi,

How can we hide the information from one inactive employee in SAP Successfactors? +

We have to comply with European GDPR.

If an inactive employee request to hide this information before the purge at 5 years, we have to hide the information for this inactive employee for all the users but keep the information in case for a legal situation.

entry.title: Internal Error ocurred while processing
entry.content: Good morning SAP Team, I hope you are doing well. Do any of you know what is the reason for the following error that people storie gives us when creating a report. There we have several calculated columns, is this what causes the error in the report? How can we solve this problem?

entry.title: S4Hana / Fiori: Staff changes >> Changes to Change Record Processors
entry.content:
What is the most efficient solution to automatically update processors in the Change Record for each task based on staff changes in our organization? If we have staff changes, they are updated in SuccessFactors. Is there an API or something that can manage the updates between SuccessFactors and processors loaded in SAP S/4HANA Change Record?

This seems like a table export/import process from SF to S4Hana somehow, but what is required to enable this solution?

entry.title: How to Automatically Delete EC Alerts when Contract End Date is Emptied?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a business rule which creates EC alerts when a fixed term employee reaches contract end date.

The problem is that the alerts doesn't automatically get deleted when the contract end date value is emptied (when employee becomes permanent).

What is the possible workaround? It seems that the Alert.Delete Old Pending Alert Flag works only if there is a new alert to insert (e.g. new Contract End Date is entered) but not if Contract End Date is removed.

Thank you.

 

Kind regards,

Gem

entry.title: Discrepancy between 'Completion Percentage' value in Story report and Employee Profile
entry.content:
Hello colleagues,

I want to see if anyone is experiencing the same frustration or has a potential solution.
We see that Story report is pulling up incorrect output for "Completion Percentage". The response that we received from the SAP team on Incident raised for this issue was that the discrepancy between "Completion Percentage" value in Story report and Employee Profile is an expected behavior. KBA note 3260246 was created identifying this issue as a problem.

We are being told that the story report result of profile percentage is based on current database value. When you access Employee Profile (PP3) page, it will calculate real time the profile percentage and save the latest percentage into database. That's why the displayed values are inconsistent and the value will refresh after go to PP3 page. But this does not seem like a reasonable long-term solution.

We are being told that keeping the percentage value of all users up to date will consume a lot of computing resources, so the gap of story report and PP3 page is current expect behavior. 

The answer from SAP is not sufficient.

We need a report showing the latest profile completion percentage. HRBP's and managers need to be able to report on this data in order to identify and inform individuals through communication to complete their profiles. Possibility for generating Ad Hoc reports with the latest (correct) "Completion Percentage" field as reportable is really needed for better HR report activity.

Has anyone else experienced this problem? Have you been able to achieve a workaround / solution? Have you explored any other options to get this data? Would highly appreciate your ideas.

We have created an enhancement request, so please do go and vote for it.   https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/294162

Thank you so much for your help, community.
